prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on the dashboard performance task. Stage 1 artifacts and Go+React codebase provided.

assertions.text: system-analysis.md identifies the sequential chart loading pattern in analytics/service.go (GetOverviewPage loads charts one by one)
system-analysis.md identifies the unused cache module in internal/cache/ (exists but not wired into analytics service)
system-analysis.md identifies the frontend rendering issue (no data downsampling, all charts render simultaneously via Recharts)
system-analysis.md references specific ClickHouse query patterns from internal/clickhouse/queries.go
constraints-risks-analysis.md identifies the risk of breaking the GraphQL API contract for potential other consumers
constraints-risks-analysis.md notes that no materialized views exist (visible in migrations/001_analytics_tables.sql)
All 3 analysis artifacts were created (product-analysis.md, system-analysis.md, constraints-risks-analysis.md)
Each analysis contains a Self-Critique Notes section
